reference: We need to know your age to come to a conclusion regarding parkinsonism. If you are planning to do some exercises, kindly focus on Frenkel's exercises and some balancing exercises under the guidance of a specialist physical therapist. He might help you achieve overall body fitness and strength, which will help you feel more confident as well.
text: We need to know your age to come to a conclusion, Parkinsonism. If you are planning to do some exercises, kindly focus on Frankel's exercises and some balancing exercises under the guidance of a specialist physical therapist. He might help you achieve overall body fitness and strength, which will help you feel more confident.
